💡 Unlock X with `AISA_API_KEY` to use the hosted AISA Twitter proxy.

Research quality: 2/5 core sources.
Missing: Polymarket, X/Twitter, YouTube.

Free fixes:
  - X/Twitter: real-time posts with likes and reposts - the fastest signal for breaking topics. Add AISA_API_KEY to unlock the AISA Twitter proxy.
  - YouTube: video transcripts with key moments - often the deepest explanations on any topic. Add AISA_API_KEY to unlock the AISA YouTube proxy.

Bonus: Reddit and Hacker News already work on public paths. GitHub still uses its official API path and may need GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN. Optional social extras such as Threads and Pinterest need AISA plus INCLUDE_SOURCES to be enabled.
